examples: Clearly, much planning and central control were involved in the expansion and ordering of this great metropolis.
Dressed in their traditional costumes, the castellers seem to epitomize an easier time, before Barcelona became a world metropolis and the Mediterranean's most dynamic city.
New Orleans is the metropolis of the American South.
Jerusalem is older than the Bible and Tel Aviv is a thoroughly modern metropolis.
Many internationals come to study, work and even retire here, adding a zest to this already cosmopolitan metropolis.
